channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War News Highlights: Ceasefire At Risk As Iran Rejects US Plan, Trump Calls Response 'Garbage'

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Highlights

item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

item.title: UAE Denies Reports Of "Secret Visit" By Israeli PM Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: Israeli PMO on Wednesday claimed that Netanyahu had made a "secret visit" to UAE amid the Iran war.

item.description: The United Arab Emirates denies reports circulating regarding an alleged visit by Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to the UAE.
item.content:encoded: The United Arab Emirates denies reports circulating regarding an alleged visit by Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to the UAE.

item.title: Analysis: Trump Wants China's Help On Iran, But Beijing Has Other Plans

media:content.media:description: Trump told reporters on Tuesday that he did not need China's help to convince Iran.

item.description: When US President Donald Trump meets Chinese President Xi Jinping this week he is expected to ask for help resolving his costly and unpopular war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: When US President Donald Trump meets Chinese President Xi Jinping this week he is expected to ask for help resolving his costly and unpopular war with Iran.

item.title: Matthew Perry Drug middleman Jailed For Two Years

media:content.media:description: The actor had been taking ketamine as part of supervised therapy for depression.

item.description: A middleman who helped provide "Friends" actor Matthew Perry with drugs in the weeks before he died from a ketamine overdose was jailed on Wednesday in California.
item.content:encoded: A middleman who helped provide "Friends" actor Matthew Perry with drugs in the weeks before he died from a ketamine overdose was jailed on Wednesday in California.

item.title: Netanyahu's Coalition Submits Bill To Dissolve Parliament, Trigger Fresh Polls

media:content.media:description: Benjamin Netanyahu's coalition on Wednesday submitted a bill to dissolve parliament.

item.description: The bill calls for elections "no less than 90 days" after it is approved, giving Netanyahu flexibility to choose a date when he feels he has the best chance of success.
item.content:encoded: The bill calls for elections "no less than 90 days" after it is approved, giving Netanyahu flexibility to choose a date when he feels he has the best chance of success.

item.title: US Senate Confirms Trump Nominee Kevin Warsh As Federal Reserve Chair

media:content.media:description: The US Senate on Wednesday confirmed Kevin Warsh as chair of the Federal Reserve.

item.description: The Senate voted 54 to 45 to confirm Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair, who like Trump has advocated for lower interest rates.
item.content:encoded: The Senate voted 54 to 45 to confirm Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair, who like Trump has advocated for lower interest rates.

item.title: German Paediatrician Charged With 130 Cases Of Child Sex Abuse Over 12 Years

media:content.media:description: The offences are alleged to have occurred between December 1, 2013 and November 5 of last year

item.description: The unidentified suspect who worked in clinics in Brandenburg state near Berlin allegedly committed the crimes over 12 years, they said in a statement, without specifying how many children were abused.
item.content:encoded: The unidentified suspect who worked in clinics in Brandenburg state near Berlin allegedly committed the crimes over 12 years, they said in a statement, without specifying how many children were abused.

item.title: Netanyahu Visited UAE "Secretly" During War With Iran, PM's Office Says

media:content.media:description: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu paid a secret visit to the United Arab Emirates

item.description: "During Operation 'Lion's Roar', Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu paid a secret visit to the United Arab Emirates, where he met with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan," his office said in a statement.
item.content:encoded: "During Operation 'Lion's Roar', Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu paid a secret visit to the United Arab Emirates, where he met with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan," his office said in a statement.

item.title: "Reserve Right To Respond": Araghchi Accuses Kuwait Of Attacking Iranian Boat

media:content.media:description: Kuwaiti authorities have sought to crack down on individuals and groups with alleged links to Iran

item.description: Kuwait's interior ministry said in a statement published by state news agency KUNA on Tuesday that four people arrested earlier this month as they attempted to enter the country by sea confessed to belonging to Iran's Revolutionary Guards.
item.content:encoded: Kuwait's interior ministry said in a statement published by state news agency KUNA on Tuesday that four people arrested earlier this month as they attempted to enter the country by sea confessed to belonging to Iran's Revolutionary Guards.

item.title: Hamas Forced Captives From Israel To Have Sex With Family Members: Report

media:content.media:description: The mother of Eden Zachariya who was abducted from the Tribe of Nova music festival

item.description: The 300-page report alleges that rape, sexual torture and humiliation were used intentionally "to maximise pain and suffering", targeting not only individuals but entire families and communities.
item.content:encoded: The 300-page report alleges that rape, sexual torture and humiliation were used intentionally "to maximise pain and suffering", targeting not only individuals but entire families and communities.

item.title: Global South Rising, BRICS Not Mere Symbolism: South Africa Minister To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Lamola, on his first-ever visit to India, noted that the bilateral relationship runs deep.

item.description: On the eve of the BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting in New Delhi, South Africa's Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, Ronald Lamola, delivered a sharp and confident message to the world - the Global South is rising.
item.content:encoded: On the eve of the BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting in New Delhi, South Africa's Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, Ronald Lamola, delivered a sharp and confident message to the world - the Global South is rising.

item.title: US Man, 41, Killed After Being Sucked Into Engine Of Frontier Airlines Aircraft During Takeoff

media:content.media:description: The aircraft was preparing for takeoff when the collision occurred.

item.description: Authorities said he was on the tarmac for less than two minutes before he was struck by the Los Angeles-bound aircraft, which was accelerating at around 139 mph.
item.content:encoded: Authorities said he was on the tarmac for less than two minutes before he was struck by the Los Angeles-bound aircraft, which was accelerating at around 139 mph.

item.title: 'Don't Have Control Over Our Enriched Uranium': Iran Minister

media:content.media:description: Joint US-Israeli strikes have repeatedly targeted Iran's nuclear sites.

item.description: Kazem Gharibabadi, Deputy Foreign Minister of Iran, in an exclusive interview with NDTV, added that Iran had been ready to discuss all aspects of the nuclear issue but that the US had refused genuine negotiations and instead demanded its own terms.
item.content:encoded: Kazem Gharibabadi, Deputy Foreign Minister of Iran, in an exclusive interview with NDTV, added that Iran had been ready to discuss all aspects of the nuclear issue but that the US had refused genuine negotiations and instead demanded its own terms.

item.title: Iran Says Control Over Hormuz To Bring "Significant" Economic Revenues

media:content.media:description: Iran has largely blocked shipping through the strait since the outbreak of war with US and Israel

item.description: Iran's military spokesman said on Wednesday that Tehran's control over the Strait of Hormuz could generate "significant" economic revenue and strengthen the country's international position.
item.content:encoded: Iran's military spokesman said on Wednesday that Tehran's control over the Strait of Hormuz could generate "significant" economic revenue and strengthen the country's international position.

item.title: Behind Marco Rubio Getting Into China, A Change In How His Name Is Written

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio championed human rights in China as a US senator

item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio was banned from entering China, so, finding a diplomatic workaround, the Chinese government and official media transliterated the first syllable of his surname with a different Chinese character for "lu".
item.content:encoded: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio was banned from entering China, so, finding a diplomatic workaround, the Chinese government and official media transliterated the first syllable of his surname with a different Chinese character for "lu".

item.title: US Man Sentenced To 30 Years For Killing Best Friend On Wedding Day

media:content.media:description: James Shirah receives prison sentence for killing his best friend on his wedding day.

item.description: Michigan groom James Shirah has been jailed for at least 30 years after killing his best friend in an accident on his wedding day.
item.content:encoded: Michigan groom James Shirah has been jailed for at least 30 years after killing his best friend in an accident on his wedding day.

item.title: NDTV Exclusive: How Mediator Pakistan Has Been Harbouring Iranian Military Jets For Years

media:content.media:description: Pakistan likely allowed Iran to position its only Boeing 747-based aerial tanker in Pakistan

item.description: In a statement, the government of Pakistan, while not denying the presence of the aircraft, has stated that it 'categorically rejects the CBS News report regarding the presence of Iranian aircraft at Nur Khan Air Base as misleading and sensationalise
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1098688/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>In a statement, the government of Pakistan, while not denying the presence of the aircraft, has stated that it 'categorically rejects the CBS News report regarding the presence of Iranian aircraft at Nur Khan Air Base as misleading and sensationalise

item.title: Trump China Visit Live Updates: Trump Arrives In China For Talks With Xi On Iran War, US Arms Sales To Taiwan

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: Iran's Missiles Still Flying, So Is Hormuz Threat. US May Be Running Out

media:content.media:description: Image generated by AI

item.description: Reports the Iranian military is far from the spent force the Trump administration wants everyone to believe it is have been followed by news that attacks may resume.
item.content:encoded: Reports the Iranian military is far from the spent force the Trump administration wants everyone to believe it is have been followed by news that attacks may resume.

item.title: Trump Arrives In China For High-Stakes Summit With Xi Jinping

media:content.media:description: Trump and Xi will hold talks at 10:00 am (0200 GMT) on Thursday

item.description: US President Donald Trump landed in Beijing on Wednesday for a high-stakes summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping aimed at easing deep tensions between the rival superpowers.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1098777/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US President Donald Trump landed in Beijing on Wednesday for a high-stakes summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping aimed at easing deep tensions between the rival superpowers.
